underlying_goal: Upgrade a legacy PHP 7.0 project to PHP 8.x and fix all compatibility, security, and dependency issues
friction_detail: Assistant jumped into fixing .htaccess/Caddy issue without investigating first; user interrupted with 'quieto, primero, usa subagentes' to enforce research-before-action workflow. Later user also said 'solo haz una review, no cambies nada' for the aura/auth deprecation analysis.
brief_summary: User wanted to upgrade a PHP 7.0 legacy project to PHP 8.2, and over the session resolved PHP 8.x compatibility errors, replaced deprecated auth/packages, updated frontend CDN versions, added PHPStan level 2, and conducted a security review—all largely successful with only minor workflow friction.
user_instructions_to_assistant: usa subagentes, por favor, esta tarea es muy compleja
antes de ponerte a trabajar, investiga, infórmame y espera a que te confirme que hacer
no cambies nada, solo haz una review
orquesta todo esto, subamos de nivel en nivel, mi ideal el 5, con eso vale, pero vamos arreglando uno a uno
